description_long: This is a single-story residential house with a sprawling, open floor plan and a large, fenced yard. The structure features multiple large windows, a prominent main entryway with steps, and a driveway leading up to the house. The backyard includes a patio area, a swimming pool, and a small play structure, all enclosed by a low brick or stone wall. The roof is primarily flat, with some sections slightly raised, and the exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color. Landscaping elements such as shrubs and flower beds are visible along the perimeter, enhancing the suburban character of the property.
description: A single-story, modern ranch-style house with a flat roof, large windows, fenced yard, pool, and driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, driveway, and large windows along the facade.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, swimming pool, patio, and play structure within the fenced area.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the patio, pool, and the arrangement of windows and doors along the side wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the driveway, side yard, and additional landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, a single front door, and a small overhang; no porch or columns.
